args: export GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN="$(op read 'op://Operations/GitHub PAT - Tools MCP Server/credential')"; exec npx -y @jpisnice/shadcn-ui-mcp-server
export EXA_API_KEY="$(op read 'op://Operations/Exa API/credential')"; exec npx -y exa-mcp-server
export FIRECRAWL_API_KEY="$(op read 'op://Operations/Firecrawl API Key/credential')" FIRECRAWL_API_URL="${FIRECRAWL_API_URL:-https://api.firecrawl.dev}"; exec npx -y firecrawl-mcp
export TAVILY_API_KEY="$(op read 'op://Operations/MCP-tavily API Key/credential')"; exec npx -y tavily-mcp
